insights.title: Increase Second Serve Win Percentage
insights.detail: Roger Federer is converting 48% of your second serves, which is higher than your overall first serve win percentage. Focus on making more accurate second serves to put pressure on Federer.

insights.title: Target Shorter Points to Regain Momentum
insights.detail: You've been in longer rallies, but your recent momentum suggests that shorter points can be won. Refocus on quick, precise shots to take control of the point and turn the match around.

insights.title: Manage Your Errors on the Return
insights.detail: You're currently making 25 return errors, which is affecting your overall return game. Make sure to be more patient and precise on your returns to limit the number of errors and create more break opportunities.
